data.description:
After FRAC-51 flips body to default normal-case, the 37 explicit 'normal-case' class instances become redundant. Mechanical cleanup pass: remove redundant normal-case, adopt .text-body / .text-body-lead where appropriate.

Spec: .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md.

Why: Dead class instances clutter className strings and obscure intent. Removing them prevents future agents from misinterpreting them as load-bearing. Depends on FRAC-51 foundation.

Acceptance: Zero 'normal-case' on body-tier elements (still allowed on headings that opt out of the italic Fraunces uppercase). .text-body / .text-body-lead adopted on substantial paragraph blocks. No visual regressions.
data.title: Body cleanup — remove redundant normal-case + adopt .text-body

data.body:
REVIEW (cold, fresh sub-agent): PASS Reviewed commit d9deacb against plan task_01KTJAQM9VFQ7FTAWQSTHEWPRC.md. Diff verification: - Stat: 2 files, 4 insertions / 5 deletions — matches expected exactly. - Campus.tsx removals at lines 176 (`

` photo caption), 218 (`

` italic accessibility note), 503 (`

` Nietzsche attribution), 532 (`

` italic role line). All four are plain `

`/`

` body elements with no `font-serif`, no `text-title`/`text-subtitle`, no uppercase ancestor — all genuinely redundant under FRAC-51's global flip. - Home.tsx: TODO comment cleanly removed; mono-block `
` className unchanged (`font-mono ... uppercase font-thin` + `style={{ fontStyle: "normal" }}` intact). Scope discipline: ✓ only 2 files touched. No changes to index.css, button.tsx, DESIGN.md, headings, eyebrows/labels, display-tier, or `.text-body` adoption. Grep audit: - `rg "normal-case" src/` = 30 (was 34 on master — exactly -4) ✓ - `rg "normal-case" src/components/sections/Campus.tsx` = 13 (was 17 — exactly -4) ✓ - `rg "TODO FRAC-56" src/` = 0 ✓ - All 13 remaining Campus hits are on `font-serif` (4) or `text-title` (9) classNames — verified line by line. - 23 intentional opt-outs all preserved (HouseBanner, Events, Projects, Vision, LabPage, NCD, DocumentBadge, Directory, LiberalArts, StoryPage spans/headings). Note: Plan's AC said "23 tsx + 1 CSS = 24 total" — that math undercounted by 6. Real total is 30. This is a plan-doc accounting error, not an impl bug. Task prompt's expected counts (30/13/0) match reality. Validation: - `pnpm typecheck` — clean. - `pnpm build` — succeeds. - `pnpm test` — 143 pass / 4 fail. The 4 failures are pre-existing baseline (footer FRAC-88, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood layout) — none touch Campus.tsx or Home.tsx body classes. No new failures. - `npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md` — 0 errors. PRD alignment: FRAC-22 PRD makes no body-voice/normal-case claims. No contradiction. Sanity check (cold reading): all 4 Campus classNames render correctly without `normal-case` (no double spaces, no orphan tokens, no broken JSX). Home.tsx mono block reads identically; comment deletion is clean. Visual diff risk: zero. The 4 Campus removals were already rendering `normal-case` via global default (FRAC-51); explicit class was redundant. Home TODO removal is doc-only. Deferred `.text-body` adoption (planner's judgment): right call. Campus dark-section paragraphs use `font-light` (weight 300) at `text-sm md:text-base`; `.text-body` is weight 400 at `text-base`. On dark green Campus surfaces, weight 300 is a deliberate readability choice — silently bumping to 400 would shift visual hierarchy. Deferring to a separate design decision is the right move. Verdict: PASS. Tiny, well-scoped, fully validated, zero visual impact. Ready to merge.
